general.name: ultraworkers/claw-code
general.description: The repo is finally unlocked. enjoy the party! The fastest repo in history to surpass 100K stars ⭐. Join Discord: https://discord.gg/5TUQKqFWd Built in Rust using oh-my-codex.
general.description_zh: 仓库终于解锁了，尽情狂欢吧！史上最快突破10万星标的仓库 ⭐。加入Discord：https://discord.gg/5TUQKqFWd 使用Rust和oh-my-codex构建。

general.name: affaan-m/everything-claude-code
general.description: The agent harness performance optimization system. Skills, instincts, memory, security, and research-first development for Claude Code, Codex, Opencode, Cursor and beyond.
general.description_zh: 智能体工具性能优化系统。为Claude Code、Codex、Opencode、Cursor等提供技能、直觉、记忆、安全及研究优先的开发支持。

general.name: forrestchang/andrej-karpathy-skills
general.description: A single CLAUDE.md file to improve Claude Code behavior, derived from Andrej Karpathy's observations on LLM coding pitfalls.
general.description_zh: 一个单一的 CLAUDE.md 文件，用于改善 Claude Code 行为，源自 Andrej Karpathy 对 LLM 编码陷阱的观察。

general.name: garrytan/gstack
general.description: Use Garry Tan's exact Claude Code setup: 23 opinionated tools that serve as CEO, Designer, Eng Manager, Release Manager, Doc Engineer, and QA
general.description_zh: 使用 Garry Tan 的精确 Claude Code 配置：23 个定制化工具，分别担任 CEO、设计师、工程经理、发布经理、文档工程师和 QA。

general.name: karpathy/autoresearch
general.description: AI agents running research on single-GPU nanochat training automatically
general.description_zh: 在单GPU纳米聊天训练上自动运行研究的AI代理

general.name: VoltAgent/awesome-design-md
general.description: A collection of DESIGN.md files inspired by popular brand design systems. Drop one into your project and let coding agents generate a matching UI.
general.description_zh: 受流行品牌设计系统启发的DESIGN.md文件合集。将其放入你的项目，让编码代理生成匹配的UI。

general.name: paperclipai/paperclip
general.description: Open-source orchestration for zero-human companies
general.description_zh: 零人工公司的开源编排方案

general.name: koala73/worldmonitor
general.description: Real-time global intelligence dashboard. AI-powered news aggregation, geopolitical monitoring, and infrastructure tracking in a unified situational awareness interface
general.description_zh: 实时全球情报仪表盘。基于AI的新闻聚合、地缘政治监控与基础设施追踪，集成于统一态势感知界面。

general.name: JuliusBrussee/caveman
general.description: 🪨 why use many token when few token do trick — Claude Code skill that cuts 65% of tokens by talking like caveman
general.description_zh: 🪨 少用token也能搞定——像原始人一样说话，Claude Code技能可减少65%的token消耗

general.name: MemPalace/mempalace
general.description: The best-benchmarked open-source AI memory system. And it's free.
general.description_zh: 最佳基准测试的开源AI记忆系统，而且完全免费。

general.name: mattpocock/skills
general.description: Skills for Real Engineers. Straight from my .claude directory.
general.description_zh: 真实工程师的技能。直接来自我的 .claude 目录。

general.name: VoltAgent/awesome-openclaw-skills
general.description: The awesome collection of OpenClaw skills. 5,400+ skills filtered and categorized from the official OpenClaw Skills Registry.🦞
general.description_zh: OpenClaw 技能的精选合集。从官方 OpenClaw 技能注册表中筛选并分类的 5,400+ 个技能。🦞

general.name: chenglou/pretext
general.description: Fast, accurate & comprehensive text measurement & layout
general.description_zh: 快速、准确且全面的文本测量与排版

general.name: HKUDS/nanobot
general.description: "🐈 nanobot: The Ultra-Lightweight Personal AI Agent"
general.description_zh: 🐈 nanobot：超轻量级个人AI智能体

general.description: AI-powered job search system built on Claude Code. 14 skill modes, Go dashboard, PDF generation, batch processing.
general.description_zh: 基于Claude Code的AI驱动求职系统。14种技能模式，Go仪表盘，PDF生成，批量处理。

general.name: safishamsi/graphify
general.description: AI coding assistant skill (Claude Code, Codex, OpenCode, Cursor, Gemini CLI, GitHub Copilot CLI, OpenClaw, Factory Droid, Trae, Google Antigravity). Turn any folder of code, docs, papers, images, or videos into a queryable knowledge graph
general.description_zh: AI编程助手技能（Claude Code、Codex、OpenCode、Cursor、Gemini CLI、GitHub Copilot CLI、OpenClaw、Factory Droid、Trae、Google Antigravity）。将任何代码、文档、论文、图片或视频文件夹转化为可查询的知识图谱。

general.name: rtk-ai/rtk
general.description: CLI proxy that reduces LLM token consumption by 60-90% on common dev commands. Single Rust binary, zero dependencies
general.description_zh: 将常见开发命令的LLM token消耗降低60-90%的CLI代理。单Rust二进制文件，零依赖

general.name: sickn33/antigravity-awesome-skills
general.description: Installable GitHub library of 1,400+ agentic skills for Claude Code, Cursor, Codex CLI, Gemini CLI, Antigravity, and more. Includes installer CLI, bundles, workflows, and official/community skill collections.
general.description_zh: 可安装的GitHub库，包含1,400+个适用于Claude Code、Cursor、Codex CLI、Gemini CLI、Antigravity等工具的代理技能。内含安装器CLI、技能包、工作流及官方/社区技能合集。

general.name: ZhuLinsen/daily_stock_analysis
general.description: LLM驱动的 A/H/美股智能分析器：多数据源行情 + 实时新闻 + LLM决策仪表盘 + 多渠道推送，零成本定时运行，纯白嫖. LLM-powered stock analysis system for A/H/US markets.
general.description_zh: LLM驱动的A/H/美股智能分析系统：多数据源行情+实时新闻+LLM决策仪表盘+多渠道推送，零成本定时运行，纯白嫖。

general.description_zh: CLI-Anything：让所有软件原生支持智能体——CLI-Hub：https://clianything.cc/

general.description: Teams-first Multi-agent orchestration for Claude Code
general.description_zh: 面向团队的Claude Code多智能体编排

general.description_zh: 面向AI代理的浏览器自动化CLI

general.description: Fast, small, and fully autonomous AI personal assistant infrastructure, ANY OS, ANY PLATFORM — deploy anywhere, swap anything 🦀

general.name: hesamsheikh/awesome-openclaw-usecases
general.description: A community collection of OpenClaw use cases for making life easier.
general.description_zh: 一个社区收集的OpenClaw用例，旨在让生活更便捷。

general.name: sipeed/picoclaw
general.description: Tiny, Fast, and Deployable anywhere — automate the mundane, unleash your creativity
general.description_zh: 小巧、快速、随处部署——自动化琐事，释放创造力

general.name: qwibitai/nanoclaw
general.description: A lightweight alternative to OpenClaw that runs in containers for security. Connects to WhatsApp, Telegram, Slack, Discord, Gmail and other messaging apps,, has memory, scheduled jobs, and runs directly on Anthropic's Agents SDK
general.description_zh: 轻量级 OpenClaw 替代方案，运行于容器中以保障安全。支持连接 WhatsApp、Telegram、Slack、Discord、Gmail 等消息应用，具备记忆功能、定时任务，并可直接运行于 Anthropic 的 Agents SDK 之上。

general.name: kepano/obsidian-skills
general.description: Agent skills for Obsidian. Teach your agent to use Markdown, Bases, JSON Canvas, and use the CLI.
general.description_zh: Obsidian 的智能体技能。教你的智能体使用 Markdown、Bases、JSON Canvas 以及 CLI。

general.name: Yeachan-Heo/oh-my-codex
general.description: OmX - Oh My codeX: Your codex is not alone. Add hooks, agent teams, HUDs, and so much more.
general.description_zh: OmX - Oh My codeX：你的代码库不再孤单。添加钩子、代理团队、HUD 以及更多功能。

general.name: addyosmani/agent-skills
general.description: Production-grade engineering skills for AI coding agents.
general.description_zh: 面向AI编程代理的生产级工程技能。

general.description: Marketing skills for Claude Code and AI agents. CRO, copywriting, SEO, analytics, and growth engineering.
general.description_zh: Claude Code 与 AI 代理的营销技能：CRO、文案撰写、SEO、分析与增长工程。

general.name: googleworkspace/cli
general.description: Google Workspace CLI — one command-line tool for Drive, Gmail, Calendar, Sheets, Docs, Chat, Admin, and more. Dynamically built from Google Discovery Service. Includes AI agent skills.
general.description_zh: Google Workspace CLI — 一个命令行工具，支持 Drive、Gmail、Calendar、Sheets、Docs、Chat、Admin 等。基于 Google Discovery Service 动态构建，包含 AI 代理技能。

general.description: runs anywhere. uses anything
general.description_zh: 随处运行，无所不用。

general.name: AlexsJones/llmfit
general.description: Hundreds of models & providers. One command to find what runs on your hardware.
general.description_zh: 数百个模型与提供商。一条命令即可找到适合你硬件的运行方案。

general.name: mvanhorn/last30days-skill
general.description: AI agent skill that researches any topic across Reddit, X, YouTube, HN, Polymarket, and the web - then synthesizes a grounded summary
general.description_zh: 跨 Reddit、X、YouTube、HN、Polymarket 及全网研究任意主题的 AI 代理技能——随后综合生成有据可依的摘要。

general.name: jamiepine/voicebox
general.description: The open-source AI voice studio. Clone, dictate, create.
general.description_zh: 开源AI语音工作室。克隆、听写、创作。

general.name: volcengine/OpenViking
general.description: OpenViking is an open-source context database designed specifically for AI Agents(such as openclaw). OpenViking unifies the management of context (memory, resources, and skills) that Agents need through a file system paradigm, enabling hierarchical context delivery and self-evolving.
general.description_zh: OpenViking 是一个专为 AI 代理（如 openclaw）设计的开源上下文数据库。OpenViking 通过文件系统范式统一管理代理所需的上下文（记忆、资源和技能），实现层级化上下文传递与自我进化。

general.name: multica-ai/multica
general.description: The open-source managed agents platform. Turn coding agents into real teammates — assign tasks, track progress, compound skills.
general.description_zh: 开源托管代理平台。将编码代理转变为真正的队友——分配任务、追踪进度、复合技能。

general.name: jarrodwatts/claude-hud
general.description: A Claude Code plugin that shows what's happening - context usage, active tools, running agents, and todo progress
general.description_zh: 一个Claude Code插件，显示当前状态——上下文使用情况、活跃工具、运行中的代理以及待办事项进度

general.name: Leey21/awesome-ai-research-writing
general.description: Elevate your AI research writing, no more tedious polishing ✨
general.description_zh: 提升你的AI研究写作，告别繁琐打磨 ✨

general.name: openai/symphony
general.description: Symphony turns project work into isolated, autonomous implementation runs, allowing teams to manage work instead of supervising coding agents.
general.description_zh: Symphony 将项目工作转化为隔离、自主的执行运行，使团队能够管理工作而非监督编码代理。

general.name: OthmanAdi/planning-with-files
general.description: Claude Code skill implementing Manus-style persistent markdown planning — the workflow pattern behind the $2B acquisition.
general.description_zh: 实现Manus风格持久化Markdown规划的Claude Code技能——20亿美元收购背后的工作流模式。

general.name: NVIDIA/NemoClaw
general.description: Run OpenClaw more securely inside NVIDIA OpenShell with managed inference
general.description_zh: 在 NVIDIA OpenShell 内更安全地运行 OpenClaw，并支持托管推理

general.name: Alishahryar1/free-claude-code
general.description: Use claude-code for free in the terminal, VSCode extension or discord like OpenClaw (voice supported)
general.description_zh: 在终端、VSCode扩展或Discord中免费使用claude-code，支持语音（类似OpenClaw）

general.name: NawfalMotii79/PLFM_RADAR
general.description: Open-source, low-cost 10.5 GHz PLFM phased array RADAR system
general.description_zh: 开源、低成本的10.5 GHz PLFM相控阵雷达系统

general.name: Panniantong/Agent-Reach
general.description: Give your AI agent eyes to see the entire internet. Read & search Twitter, Reddit, YouTube, GitHub, Bilibili, XiaoHongShu — one CLI, zero API fees.
general.description_zh: 为你的AI代理装上观察整个互联网的眼睛。读取并搜索Twitter、Reddit、YouTube、GitHub、Bilibili、小红书——一个CLI，零API费用。

general.name: jackwener/OpenCLI
general.description: Make Any Website & Tool Your CLI. A universal CLI Hub and AI-native runtime. Transform any website, Electron app, or local binary into a standardized command-line interface. Built for AI Agents to discover, learn, and execute tools seamlessly via a unified AGENT.md integration.
general.description_zh: 将任何网站和工具变成你的 CLI。一个通用的 CLI 中心与 AI 原生运行时。将任意网站、Electron 应用或本地二进制程序转化为标准化的命令行界面。专为 AI 智能体设计，通过统一的 AGENT.md 集成，实现工具的无缝发现、学习与执行。

general.name: snarktank/ralph
general.description: Ralph is an autonomous AI agent loop that runs repeatedly until all PRD items are complete.
general.description_zh: Ralph 是一个自主AI代理循环，会持续运行直到所有PRD项完成。

general.name: claude-code-best/claude-code
general.description: 原汁原昧 Claude Code 可运行,可构建, 可调试版; Typescript 类型全修复; 企业级可靠性; 安全无毒, lock 文件保真, 可直接 bun i; bun run dev 启动

ai.name: volcengine/OpenViking
ai.description: OpenViking is an open-source context database designed specifically for AI Agents(such as openclaw). OpenViking unifies the management of context (memory, resources, and skills) that Agents need through a file system paradigm, enabling hierarchical context delivery and self-evolving.
ai.description_zh: OpenViking 是一个专为 AI 代理（如 openclaw）设计的开源上下文数据库。OpenViking 通过文件系统范式统一管理代理所需的上下文（记忆、资源和技能），实现层级化上下文传递与自我进化。

ai.name: multica-ai/multica
ai.description: The open-source managed agents platform. Turn coding agents into real teammates — assign tasks, track progress, compound skills.
ai.description_zh: 开源托管代理平台。将编码代理转变为真正的队友——分配任务、追踪进度、复合技能。

ai.name: jarrodwatts/claude-hud
ai.description: A Claude Code plugin that shows what's happening - context usage, active tools, running agents, and todo progress
ai.description_zh: 一个Claude Code插件，显示当前状态——上下文使用情况、活跃工具、运行中的代理以及待办事项进度

ai.name: Leey21/awesome-ai-research-writing
ai.description: Elevate your AI research writing, no more tedious polishing ✨
ai.description_zh: 提升你的AI研究写作，告别繁琐打磨 ✨

ai.name: openai/symphony
ai.description: Symphony turns project work into isolated, autonomous implementation runs, allowing teams to manage work instead of supervising coding agents.
ai.description_zh: Symphony 将项目工作转化为隔离、自主的执行运行，使团队能够管理工作而非监督编码代理。

ai.name: OthmanAdi/planning-with-files
ai.description: Claude Code skill implementing Manus-style persistent markdown planning — the workflow pattern behind the $2B acquisition.
ai.description_zh: 实现Manus风格持久化Markdown规划的Claude Code技能——20亿美元收购背后的工作流模式。

ai.name: Panniantong/Agent-Reach
ai.description: Give your AI agent eyes to see the entire internet. Read & search Twitter, Reddit, YouTube, GitHub, Bilibili, XiaoHongShu — one CLI, zero API fees.
ai.description_zh: 为你的AI代理装上观察整个互联网的眼睛。读取并搜索Twitter、Reddit、YouTube、GitHub、Bilibili、小红书——一个CLI，零API费用。

ai.name: jackwener/OpenCLI
ai.description: Make Any Website & Tool Your CLI. A universal CLI Hub and AI-native runtime. Transform any website, Electron app, or local binary into a standardized command-line interface. Built for AI Agents to discover, learn, and execute tools seamlessly via a unified AGENT.md integration.
ai.description_zh: 将任何网站和工具变成你的 CLI。一个通用的 CLI 中心与 AI 原生运行时。将任意网站、Electron 应用或本地二进制程序转化为标准化的命令行界面。专为 AI 智能体设计，通过统一的 AGENT.md 集成，实现工具的无缝发现、学习与执行。

ai.name: snarktank/ralph
ai.description: Ralph is an autonomous AI agent loop that runs repeatedly until all PRD items are complete.
ai.description_zh: Ralph 是一个自主AI代理循环，会持续运行直到所有PRD项完成。

ai.description: Open-source Agent Operating System
ai.description_zh: 开源Agent操作系统

general.name: ohmyzsh/ohmyzsh
general.description: 🙃   A delightful community-driven (with 2,400+ contributors) framework for managing your zsh configuration. Includes 300+ optional plugins (rails, git, macOS, hub, docker, homebrew, node, php, python, etc), 140+ themes to spice up your morning, and an auto-update tool that makes it easy to keep up with the latest updates from the community.
general.description_zh: 一个由社区驱动（拥有2400+贡献者）的框架，用于管理你的zsh配置。包含300+可选插件（rails、git、macOS、hub、docker、homebrew、node、php、python等），140+主题让你的早晨更有活力，以及一个自动更新工具，轻松跟上社区最新动态。
